dataset: Yahoo Finance SPY, AAPL, MSFT daily OHLCV data

pi_items.source: Data files verified to exist: SPY.Last.txt, AAPL.Last.txt, MSFT.Last.txt in examples/ninja_trader_env/data/
Data analysis: Each file contains 502 rows spanning 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31 (728 calendar days), consistent with ~252 trading days/year × 2 years
Task description and metadata requirement: task must create 3 distinct tabs (SPY, AAPL, MSFT) in single window
Task description and metadata requirement: task must create 1 chart window containing multiple tabs, not multiple windows

pi_items.metadata_value: real Yahoo Finance data (SPY, AAPL, MSFT 2023-2024)
pi_items.source: Data validation: (1) Format matches NinjaTrader daily OHLCV format (Date;Open;High;Low;Close;Volume). (2) Date range: 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31 (502 trading days). (3) Price returns match actual market returns: SPY +53.90% (actual 2023-2024: ~54%), AAPL +100.22% (actual: ~95%), MSFT +75.93% (actual: ~79%). (4) env.json explicitly states 'real Yahoo Finance data'

privileged_info_summary: The task uses three real financial instruments from 2023-2024: SPY (S&P 500 ETF) closed at $380.82 on 2023-01-03 and $586.08 on 2024-12-31; AAPL closed at $125.07 on 2023-01-03 and $250.42 on 2024-12-31; MSFT closed at $239.58 on 2023-01-03 and $421.50 on 2024-12-31. All data is daily OHLCV format with 502 rows covering approximately 2 years of market history. The task requires creation of a single NinjaTrader chart window containing exactly 3 tabs (one for each instrument) at Daily timeframe, demonstrating UI tabbed interface creation rather than multiple window management.
